name: Lima Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over the beans to remove stones and dirt. Rinse well and drain.
Soak covered with cold water for 15 to 20 minutes, then drain thoroughly.
2. In a large pot, combine beans and remaining ingredients. Add enough
cold water to cover by 1 inch. Bring to simmering point and cook, covered,
until beans are tender but not mushy, about 1 hour and 45 minutes.
If needed, add more water to keep beans covered.
3. Discard the ham skin. Serve hot.
